lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.
The car is in fair condition. The exterior has visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows signs of wear. The vehicle is operational but may require some mechanical maintenance.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable option for daily commuting. Mechanically, the engine and transmission are functional, though the vehicle shows its age with some minor fluid leaks and wear on the suspension components. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and small dings, while the interior shows typical wear on the upholstery and dashboard. It is a solid runner that would benefit from some preventative maintenance to ensure long-term reliability.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable driver, though it displays clear signs of its age and use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches and a minor dent on the passenger door, while the interior shows significant wear on the fabric seats and some fading on the dashboard. Mechanically, the car starts and runs reliably, but it will eventually need minor repairs such as new brake pads and a suspension tune-up. It is a functional choice for a buyer who prioritizes utility over aesthetics.

Check out this fantastic opportunity to own a dependable vehicle at a great price! This car is in fair condition, showing some honest signs of use like minor scuffs and interior wear that come with its journey. It’s a budget-friendly option that’s still ready to get you where you need to go!
This vehicle is in mint condition. The exterior and interior show no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.

Presenting a distinguished addition to our inventory, this vehicle exemplifies mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. Meticulously maintained to ensure a superior driving experience, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking reliability and value.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable new ride? 🚗 I'm parting with my car and it's been such a joy to own. It's in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for your daily commutes or fun weekend getaways. It runs beautifully and is ready to hit the road with a new owner today! I'm so excited for someone else to enjoy it as much as I have.
This E46 M3 is a mechanically sorted driver’s car featuring the iconic S54B32 inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS. The
Solid vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Everything works. Priced to sell.

This meticulously maintained 2018 BMW M3 is a stunning example of precision engineering and care. Finished in timeless Alpine White, the exterior retains a brilliant shine, showing only minor stone chips on the front fascia consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the Sakhir Orange leather upholstery remains supple and vibrant, with all interior electronics, including the premium Harman Kardon sound system and navigation, functioning perfectly. Under the hood, the twin-turbocharged inline-six runs smoothly, supported by a full service history and recent fluid changes. The dual-clutch transmission provides crisp, immediate shifts, and the vehicle sits on original alloy wheels wrapped in tires with excellent tread life. This is a smoke-free, garage-kept vehicle that offers a reliable and exhilarating driving experience for its next owner.

We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic appeal. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for roadworthiness and cabin comfort. An exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking dependable performance and refined styling at a competitive valuation.

This impeccably maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning motorist. Engineered for consistent performance and presented in a state of high aesthetic preservation, it offers a sophisticated driving experience without compromise. Every component reflects a history of diligent care, ensuring that this automobile remains a reliable and prestigious choice for its next owner.

Hey everyone! I'm parting ways with my awesome car, and it's looking for a new home! It’s been such a reliable ride for me and is still in great shape. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a road trip, this beauty is ready to go. I've taken really good care of it, so you're getting a fantastic deal on a solid vehicle. Shoot me a message if you want to come see it!

Offered is a mechanically sound E92 M3 featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8. This unit retains its factory-spec individual throttle bodies and ionic current knock sensing system, delivering linear power through the 8,400 RPM range. The chassis remains composed with operational Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a responsive M Variable Differential Lock ensuring optimal torque vectoring. Maintenance includes recent rod bearing prophylaxis and a throttle actuator refresh, maintaining the integrity of the high-strung powertrain. The hydraulic rack-and-pinion steering provides the tactile feedback synonymous with this platform. A driver-focused example that balances track-capable kinematics with grand touring civility.
Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean interior. Regular maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

This vehicle is in excellent mechanical shape and has been meticulously cared for throughout its life. The exterior maintains a deep gloss, with only minor, expected stone chips from highway driving. Inside, the cabin is smoke-free and well-preserved, featuring supple leather seats with minimal wear and a fully functional infotainment system. We’ve recently completed a full multi-point inspection, including a fresh oil change and tire rotation, ensuring it’s ready for the road immediately. It drives straight and shifts smoothly, offering a reliable and comfortable experience for any commute. While it shows light signs of use consistent with its age, it remains a standout example of its class, perfect for someone seeking a balance of premium features and long-term value.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive reliability and performance. This vehicle has been rigorously maintained to ensure mechanical integrity and long-term dependability. Featuring a well-preserved interior and a refined exterior profile, it offers a sophisticated driving experience for the discerning professional. This unit represents an exceptional value proposition for those who demand quality without compromise.

This distinguished vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Meticulously maintained and demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity, it offers a refined driving experience characterized by both reliability and performance. The interior remains well-preserved, complementing a robust exterior that reflects a history of attentive care. A superior choice for those seeking quality without compromise.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a fantastic car. It’s in really solid shape and has been super well-maintained—perfect for someone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is totally ready for its next adventure! I’d love to see it go to a good home where it'll be appreciated. Feel free to reach out if you have any questions!
This E46 M3 is a mechanically sorted example featuring the high-revving S54B32 3.2L inline
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Runs smoothly. Clean title.

Meticulously maintained and showing clear pride of ownership, this vehicle offers a superb blend of performance and comfort. The exterior retains a high-gloss finish with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with careful use, while the interior remains a pristine, smoke-free environment with all premium upholstery and climate controls functioning perfectly. Mechanically, the car is in robust health, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule; it features a responsive engine, smooth shifting, and a set of tires with substantial tread remaining. This is a reliable, turn-key example that looks as impressive in the driveway as it feels on the open road, ready for its next long-term owner.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced synthesis of performance and value. Comprehensive inspections confirm its robust operational status, ensuring a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. An exceptional acquisition for those prioritizing long-term functionality and professional presentation.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the automobile offers a balanced synthesis of performance and reliability. Every component has been thoroughly vetted to ensure compliance with our rigorous standards for quality and roadworthiness.

Hey there! Are you looking for a reliable ride that’s ready for its next adventure? This beauty has been super well-maintained and is in solid shape, perfect for someone who needs a dependable set of wheels without the brand-new price tag. It runs like a dream and is just waiting for a new owner to take it out on the road. Come check it out and see for yourself—you're going to love how it drives!

This E92 M3 features the legendary S65 naturally aspirated 4.0L V8, delivering linear power delivery up to an 8,400 RPM redline. The chassis remains taut with functional Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and a precision-tuned M-Variable differential lock ensuring optimal power distribution across the rear axle. Recent preventative maintenance includes rod bearing replacement and updated throttle body actuators, preserving the mechanical integrity of this high-revving masterpiece. Finished in Interlagos Blue, the exterior shows well with minor patina consistent with its mileage, while the interior retains its driver-centric ergonomics.
Clean title. Regular maintenance performed. Minor cosmetic wear. Engine and transmission run well. Interior is clean.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and daily reliability. The exterior retains a deep shine, with only minor road wear consistent with careful ownership. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with plush leather seating that shows minimal aging. Mechanically, it is sound; we have performed all scheduled maintenance, including a recent oil change and brake inspection. The engine pulls smoothly, and the transmission shifts effortlessly. It comes equipped with premium audio and advanced safety features, making it a dependable choice for your next adventure. Ready for its next owner with plenty of miles left to give.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to an exacting standard. It offers robust mechanical performance complemented by a well-preserved aesthetic, ensuring both reliability and a commanding presence on the road. This offering represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a high-caliber transport solution that balances performance with exceptional value.
